name: Interactive Strength, Inc.
business: Interactive Strength, Inc. sells connected fitness equipment including Wattbike, CLMBR, FORME Studio, and FORME Studio Lift, along with accompanying accessories and coaching services, collectively referred to as the FORME platform. The company also offers subscription-based digital fitness content and live personal training services.

exposures.sentence: our immersive, customizable, and digital fitness platform, which include the Wattbike, CLMBR, FORME Studio, FORME Studio Lift, accompanying accessories, and our coaching services which we collectively refer to as the FORME platform.
we launched our Live 1:1 personal training service in July 2022.
